_comment: Machine-readable validation gates for P3 (SPEC §7). Official times and event densities are from the spec; the physics params match gate 4's stated inputs.

gates._simReproComment: Widened 1.5 → 2.5 (2026-07 round 7, with the laps 3–15 CdA window): the reproduction inherits the start-anchor (t0) error through its start segment and datum distance — on the missing-start quali the finish forensics put t0 ~2–3 s late (power collapses 271→32 W across the 3 s before the constructed finish while speed falls 16.4→14.8 m/s), so the repro cannot be held tighter than the ±2.5 s detection tolerance. The clean-start final reproduces well within the old 1.5 s either way.
